headline: Equinix (EQIX) Introduces New Multi Cloud Sovereignty Network Solution
summary: Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) is one of the 10 Best Stocks in Steve Cohen’s Portfolio. On May 14, 2026, Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) announced the global expansion of Equinix Fabric Geo Zones across five continents, introducing the first network-level, multi-cloud sovereignty solution. With the tightening global regulatory frameworks like GDPR and LGPD, standard networks often route data […]
